goal: Make front-loaded 'operator trading status' and 'operator workflow status' trigger operator/technical mode (exposing the four posture flags) instead of executive mode, while preserving the executive default for normal questions. Read-only; no execution; no broker/paper/live control; no fake trades/PnL/performance; no new routes/storage; classifier unchanged; forbidden commands still refuse.
problem: Operator/technical mode was only reachable when the trigger appeared after the intent (e.g. 'trading status operator mode', 'workflow status operator mode', 'show technical details', 'diagnostics'). The bare front-loaded phrase 'operator trading status' / 'operator workflow status' returned executive wording because the _operator flag matched 'operator mode' but not the standalone word 'operator'.

implementation.change: Added one OR clause to the _operator detection: ('operator' in q and ('trading' in q or 'workflow' in q or 'pipeline' in q or 'status' in q)). This promotes front-loaded 'operator ...' phrasing to operator/technical mode. Normal executive questions never contain the word 'operator', so the executive default is preserved. No other lines touched.
reads_only: api_jarvis_status aggregate (system_core, commander_snapshot, factory_status, candidate_registry, trading_detail)

behavior_after.operator_trading_status: operator trading read: 'observation-only' + read_only=true, paper_ready=false, live_ready=false, broker_control=false; no invented performance
behavior_after.operator_workflow_status: operator workflow read: 'Workflow health (read-only, operator detail)' + the four posture flags + commander warnings/counts
behavior_after.normal_trading_status: still executive (no posture flags, no 'operator detail')

test_results.invocation_note: Run from tests/ with PYTHONPATH=.. and --noconftest to avoid a pre-existing corrupt repo-root directory ('hydra ' = private-use char + trailing space) that breaks pytest root enumeration; unrelated to this change.
test_results.operator_executive_regression_subset: 108 passed (selector: operator or executive or _et_ or _tet_ or _wh_ or _op_)

commit_note: Awaiting approval per bundle commit policy.
